{{Infobox technique
| name = Strings of Shadow
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Strings of Shadow Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Strings of [[Shadow]] is a central technique belonging to the [[Path of the Chainkeeper]], which serves as the foundational method for that specific path. It is one of seven techniques contained within a book associated with this path, which seeks to unify various shadow-based disciplines. The technique manifests as flexible ropes or strands of dark force and [[shadow madra]] that can be used for a wide variety of tactical applications. Users can employ the technique to ensnare, bind, or pull targets, such as pinning enemies to surfaces, webbing large areas like rooms or cities, or even grabbing individuals to manipulate their movement. With advanced training, the technique can be hardened into rigid forms like arrows or used to create massive defensive structures, such as protective domes. It can also be projected through objects like staves or compressed into high-density projectiles. Beyond physical [[binding]], the technique possesses spiritual properties, capable of affecting a target's soul or being used to anchor a user in place. While it is primarily a tool of control and utility, it can be integrated into more complex combat maneuvers involving shadow-based constructs.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Strings of Shadow]] is a central technique from the [[Path of the Chainkeeper]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Strings of Shadow]] is a technique used by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Strings of Shadow]] can grab targets by the arms and shoulders.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Strings of Shadow]] was the first technique [[Mercy]] mastered.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|String of [[Shadow]] is a technique that [[Mercy]] can forge into a rigid arrow.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]]'s arrows are made from solidified [[Strings of Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Strings of Shadow]] is a technique used to pull oneself or others.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] extends a String of [[Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Strings of Shadow]] are dark tendrils that can snatch up targets.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Strings of Shadow]] is a technique used to tie down a [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Strings of Shadow]] is a technique that uses strands of [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Strings of Shadow]] can be enhanced with [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Strings of Shadow]] were lashing [[Mercy]] to the ceiling.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A String of [[Shadow]] grabbed a small stone from [[Mercy]]'s [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Strings of Shadow]] is used for propulsion.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s [[Strings of Shadow]] techniques were destroyed when she tried to [[Forge]] them.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] used [[Strings of Shadow]] to grab [[Mercy]] and slam her to the floor.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] used [[Strings of Shadow]] to tie up an obsidian butterfly [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Strings of Shadow]] can erupt from [[Mercy]] in a city-sized web.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Strings of Shadow]] is a dome-like technique used to protect people.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
